description_long: This is a dark-colored ceramic cup with a glossy finish, featuring a festive 'Happy Birthday' design. The exterior is decorated with gold and silver balloons, confetti, and celebratory motifs, while the words 'Happy Birthday to You' and a cake with candles are prominently displayed on one side. The cup has a smoothly curved handle, ergonomically shaped for easy gripping. The interior is a clean, light gray or white, contrasting with the dark exterior. The surface appears hard and smooth, typical of glazed ceramic. The overall design is cheerful and suitable for celebratory occasions, making it a standout piece in any urban kitchen or café setting.
description: A glossy, dark ceramic cup with gold and silver balloon decorations and 'Happy Birthday' text, featuring a curved handle and festive design.
description_view_0: This view shows the cup's side with gold and silver balloons and confetti on a dark background.
description_view_1: This view highlights the 'Happy Birthday to You' text and cake motif, along with the handle.
description_view_2: This angle shows the handle and a partial view of the balloon decorations, with confetti details.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the balloon and confetti pattern, with the handle visible on the left side.
